[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up shows a yellow, cartoon-like character with a rounded head and simple facial features in front of an outdoor-looking building scene.

The main subject is a yellow, humanoid, plush-like character with a large circular head, small dark eyes, black eyebrow-like shapes above the eyes, and a dark red oval mouth with an open expression. The character’s body is bare and yellow, with a slightly rounded torso visible at the bottom of the frame, and it faces toward the camera.

The setting appears outdoors or in a stylized exterior environment, with a building in the background. Behind the character, there is a brown wall on the left with evenly spaced rectangular details, and a blue structure on the right with windows and a darker doorway area. A few small objects are visible near the right side, but details are unclear.

Lighting is soft and even, and the camera angle is close and slightly upward or level, focusing on the character’s face and upper body. The composition places the character’s head prominently in the center-left, with the background building filling the rest of the frame.

No important visible text detected.

The image shows a close-up of a yellow cartoon character with an open mouth and dark eyes looking toward the camera. The background includes parts of a building with blue and brown elements and window shapes.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
